name: Country Bread Sausage Stuffing for Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage in a skillet, breaking it up with a fork as it cooks, until all pink color is gone.
2. Pour off and discard all but 1/2 cup of accumulated liquid.
3. Add celery and onion to the skillet. Cook onion, stirring in salt, pepper, basil, and oregano.
4. Place bread cubes in a large bowl.
5. Add sausage mixture, parsley, and enough chicken broth to moisten to the bread cubes.
6. Mix gently until combined.
7. This will stuff one 12 to 14 lb turkey.
8. Bake excess in an ungreased casserole at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
